creator: kenji.rikitake@acm.org
text:
nodejs dev team has announced v0.10.21 for "an undisclosed HTTP vulnerability fix."
This is a very crude kludge to put v0.10.21, instead of v0.10.20 as of 0000UTC 19-OCT-2013.
See
https://groups.google.com/forum/#!msg/nodejs/NEbweYB0ei0/gWvyzCunYjsJ
for the details of the severity.

Fix: Patch given. Apply this at /usr/local/www/node and rebuild the Port.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: /usr/local/bin/node --version
